---
title: "John Henry Ingram"
---

## John Henry Ingram

**Dates:** (1849-1916)

### Description

editor

### Biography

He was editor of the Eminent Women series to which CMY contributed <i>Hannah More</i>.

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 8th [1889]
- Letter from Novr 4th [1887]
- Letter from Oct 29th 1887
- Letter from Oct 19th 1886

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
